content.full_text:
December 10, 1990

John Wallace, Esq.
Fair Political Practices Commission
State of California
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Re: Surplus funds of Save Affordable Housing Committee
(No on Measure E - Berkeley City Ballot Measure)
I.D. 902112

Dear Mr. Wallace:

This letter will confirm our telephone conversation of December 10, 1990, at which time we discussed the question of the disposition of the surplus funds remaining in the Save Affordable Housing account. I informed you that it was the committee's intention to donate these funds to the Berkeley Tenants' Union, an organization of long-standing which has provided services to Berkeley's tenant community for the past twenty years and whose goals are similar to those of the Save Affordable Housing Committee. It was your opinion that such a transfer of surplus funds would be proper and permissible under applicable law.

Thank you for your advice and assistance with regard to this question.

Sincerely,

JEFFREY J. CARTER
Treasurer, Save Affordable Housing
JFC/ags
